heroHeadline: Trump Issues 'Living in Hell' Ultimatum as Zarif Floats Peace Roadmap and Oman Brokers Hormuz Talks
heroSubtitle: Trump escalates rhetorical pressure with profanity-laced Iran ultimatum on Day 37; Iran's former FM Zarif proposes diplomatic peace roadmap while Gulf states cite exclusion; Oman and Iran hold talks on Strait of Hormuz civilian transit.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
